name: Le Berceur de Failles
description: Quadrupède titanesque dont chaque pas fracture la croûte terrestre. Sa gueule béante crache des ondes sismiques capables de pulvériser des fortifications entières.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, epic scale. A colossal quadrupedal subterranean beast made of black obsidian plates and cracked volcanic rock. Glowing magma veins pulse across its body. It opens a massive jaw releasing visible shockwaves that fracture the ground. Multiple pupilless orange eyes. Urban ruins embedded in its rocky hide. Cinematic lighting, volcanic dust atmosphere, highly detailed digital painting.
